name: search_docs
description: Search the BM25 RAG index over project documentation (README, docs/, CONTRIBUTING.md, docstrings, inline comments) for content relevant to a query. Use this when you need background context, design rationale, or conceptual explanation that is not in the symbol body itself.

query.description: Natural language search query describing what you are looking for. Be specific — e.g. 'retry policy exponential backoff', not just 'retry'.

k.description: Number of top results to return. Defaults to 5. Increase to 10 when the first pass misses relevant context. Maximum 20.
